targets.name: article and child comment are absent after articleDelete

notes: Live 2025-01 capture creates a disposable blog/article plus one REST-created article comment, records the pre-delete article/comment graph as the parity cassette, deletes the article through Admin GraphQL, then proves article(id:) and filtered comments(first:) no longer expose the cascaded comment. The direct comment(id:) branch remains runtime-test-backed because the public Admin API returned a known internal-error response for missing comments after delete instead of a stable null payload. Proxy replay hydrates the existing upstream article/comment graph through the cassette before staging the supported articleDelete locally.
